description: Style NoteSporty fashion never looked this good! This pair of performance oriented force 10 shoes is the right choice to complement your casual weekend wear. The brand's shoes have always made the cut when it comes to off-duty dressing - this pair refines that look for you. What's more you can wear these shoes for a power walk as well.Product DetailsOlive green round toed shoe with suede-styling on the upperHas central lace-ups and a padded tongue and innerHas stitch detail all over the shoeLightweight rubber outsole raised at the heel with curvy lugs all overMaterial and CareSuedeWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
